issue.title: Link compiler segment plans into model

artifacts.role: segment model manifest with compiler-emitted segment plans linked into cases
model runner comparing emitted segment_plans against the expected model ledger
nested parent and partial segment_plans evidence source
ADR-005 checkpoint note for compiler segment-plan evidence
compiler operations note for model-linked segment plans

claims: The template-segment model consumes compiler-emitted segment_plans evidence for the include-side-effect direct script, admin-style segment shell, nested parent shell, and nested partial shell.
The model runner validates original path, adapter, adoption mode, segment order, caller-scope facts, include semantics, observable effects, and unsupported=[] for all four compiler-emitted plans.
The model distinguishes older bridge/context classifications from compiler-emitted segment metadata without broadening mixed-template or whole-file ownership claims.
non_claims: This does not claim generated ownership of existing WordPress mixed PHP/HTML files.
This does not claim full theme, admin, feed, or block template ownership.
This does not claim HHX/HXX is parity evidence for existing WordPress templates.
This does not claim arbitrary Haxe expression lowering into PHP caller scope.
This does not claim whole-file ownership for any WordPress file.
